title: Silky Nostalgic Algerian Cranberry Stir-fry
description: A fresh and silky Algerian dish featuring cranberries in a bhuna-style sauce, infused with aromatic spices that evoke nostalgia for old times.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: for stir-frying the onion and spices

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp ground coriander
ingredients.notes: for a touch of citrusy freshness

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add finely chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, ground cumin, and ground coriander. Cook for another minute.
Toss in the cranberries along with finely chopped cilantro.
Squeeze lemon juice over the mixture to brighten flavors.
Serve immediately as a side dish or enjoy it on its own as a light meal.
